Stop.prompt:
FIRST: Check if any Merlin runs happened this session by looking for new timestamped folders in results/ created today. If NO new folders exist, do nothing and stop here — this was not an Merlin session.

IF new run folders exist:
1. Read qa_report.json and script.txt from each new run folder
2. Check if these folders are already logged in memory.md Run Log (avoid duplicates)
3. For unlogged runs, append to memory.md:
   - Run Log entry: date | brand | product | mode | model | pass/fail | one-sentence takeaway
   - Quality findings under What Works or What Fails (one sentence each)
4. Prefix output with 🪄
